title: Muttalai Muttallai Lyrics Yennamo Yedho Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Muttaalaai Muttaallai
Singers: D. Imman, Maria Ree Vincent
Music: D Imman
Lyrics: Karky
Movie: Yennamo Yedho

Muttaalaai Muttaallai
Muttaalaai Muttaallai
Muttaalaai Muttaallai yen maarinen.
en nenjai pandhaakki yen veesinen.
vaangenum poomegam naan maeigiren.
maatrangal yenendru aaraaigiren.

sathiyamai idhu boomiyum illai
sathiyamai idhu naanum illai.
sathiyamai naan poi solveney
athan karanam nee illai. (2)

Life is like a story
you can take it anywhere you want.
what you feeling baby
just come out and say anyhow you want
gotta take it slowly
dont wanna miss little things that come our away
wanna be a blessing and lightup everyone today.

Aayiram pengal kadandhirpen
aaro yezho kadhal adhil
appodhellaam maara uzhagam
indreppadi maariyadhu.

Suvarai kaagidham aakkugiren
en mookai penaa aakugiren.
mai endhan mookkai vittu
un peyarai theettukiren.
viralai kondu swasikkiren
thazhaikelaaga yosikkiren.
Kadhil unnai oottugiren.

sathiyamai idhu boomiyum illai
sathiyamai idhu naanum illai.
sathiyamai naan poi solveney
athan karanam nee illai.

shake your body
shake your body
come join again.

Muttaalaai Muttaallai
Muttaalaai Muttaallai
Muttaalaai Muttaallai yen maarinen.
en nenjai pandhaakki yen veesinen.
vaangenum poomegam naan maeigiren.
maatrangal yenendru

sathiyamai idhu boomiyum illai
sathiyamai idhu naanum illai.
sathiyamai naan poi solveney
athan karanam nee illai.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Muttalai Muttallai conveys themes of joy and celebration, reflecting the carefree spirit of life.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Ennamo Yedho, the song captures a lively moment that showcases the characters' happiness and zest for life.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features the talented singers D Imman and Maria Ree Vincent, with music composed by D Imman himself.

When was the song released?

Muttalai Muttallai was released on January 19, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Muttalai Muttallai from Ennamo Yedho is an energetic duet that encapsulates the spirit of celebration and joy. It features lively beats and catchy lyrics that evoke a sense of happiness and excitement. The collaboration between D Imman and Maria Ree Vincent brings a fresh vibe, making it perfect for parties and celebrations. Overall, the song conveys a carefree attitude, inviting listeners to embrace the joy of life.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Muttalai Muttallai from the movie Ennamo Yedho is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, featuring a unique collaboration between the talented D Imman and the melodious Maria Ree Vincent. This upbeat track is sure to get you on your feet with its infectious energy and catchy lyrics. Dive into the rhythm and let the music take you on a delightful journey!
stanzaMeanings: I have changed my ways. I have made my heart my own. I am like a flower that blooms. I am questioning what changes are for.
This is not true, this world is not true. This is not true, I am not true. I will lie about the truth because you are not here.

Life is like a story you can take it anywhere you want. What you feeling baby just come out and say anyhow you want. Gotta take it slowly, don't wanna miss little things that come our way. Wanna be a blessing and light up everyone today.
I have crossed a thousand girls, whoever it is, love changes everything. The world changes like this.
I am turning my face into a paper, I am turning my mouth into a pen. I am letting go of my mouth to call your name. I am breathing with my fingers, thinking deeply. I am embracing you with love.
This is not true, this world is not true. This is not true, I am not true. I will lie about the truth because you are not here.
Shake your body, shake your body, come join again.
I have changed my ways. I have made my heart my own. I am like a flower that blooms. I am questioning what changes are for.
This is not true, this world is not true. This is not true, I am not true. I will lie about the truth because you are not here.
